mapper.select:
select g.id id, g.code code, g.name name, g.type type, g.remark remark, u.display_name creator, g.create_time createTime, ur.display_name updater, g.update_time updateTime, (select count(r.id) from system_user_group_r r where r.group_id = g.id and r.type = g.type and r.deleted = 0) as userCount from system_user_group g left join system_user u on g.creator = u.user_name and u.deleted = 0 left join system_user ur on g.updater = ur.user_name and ur.deleted = 0
g.deleted = 0
and g.type in
#{type}
and g.name like '%' || #{searchVo.userGroupName} || '%' ESCAPE '/'
order by g.create_time desc

select u.id , u.user_name userName, u.display_name displayName, u.email , u.office_location officeLocation, u.post from system_user u inner join system_user_group_r r on r.user_id = u.id and r.group_id = #{id} and r.deleted = 0

select g.id, g.code, g.name, g.type from system_user_group g inner join system_user_group_role_r r on r.group_id = g.id and g.type = #{menuType} and r.role_id = #{roleId} and r.deleted = 0 and g.deleted = 0

select u.id , u.user_name userName, u.display_name displayName, u.email , u.office_location officeLocation, u.post from system_user u inner join system_user_group_r r on r.user_id = u.id and r.group_id = #{id} and r.deleted = 0 and u.deleted = 0
select g.id, g.code, g.name, g.type from system_user_group g inner join system_user_group_r r on r.group_id = g.id and r.user_id = #{userId} and r.type = #{type} and g.deleted = 0 and r.deleted = 0
select g.id, g.code, g.name, g.type from system_user_group g inner join fr_report_user_group_r r on r.group_id = g.id and r.fr_report_id = #{reportId} and g.deleted = 0 and r.deleted = 0
